name: bim-view-navigator
description: Named saved viewpoints panel (IfcViewDefinition). role=listbox list with 48×32px thumbnails. Workplace: save, rename, delete, reorder. Console: activate only (read-only). Analogous to the Views panel in Revit / Views tab in Navisworks.
html:
Views

  • Ground floor plan IfcViewDefinition · 2026-04-28

variants.name: workplace
variants.description: Add button visible; inline rename on double-click; delete on hover; drag-handle reorder.

variants.name: console
variants.description: Add button hidden; rename + delete hidden; activate on click only.

aria: role='listbox' on <ul> with aria-label='Saved views'. role='option' + aria-selected on each <li>. Thumbnail: aria-hidden='true'. Add button: aria-label='Save current view' + aria-keyshortcuts. Keyboard: Up/Down navigate; Enter activates; Delete removes (workplace).

view_data_model.data-ifc-guid: IfcViewDefinition GlobalId when synced to IFC
view_data_model.data-section-planes: JSON array of active section plane states
view_data_model.data-selection: comma-separated GUIDs of selected elements at capture
